title: Artifact Lineage
description: Governed artifact lineage record connecting pipeline stages BR → BD → BE → BF → BG → BH → SLO with full traceability.

parent_artifact_ids.description: IDs of direct parent artifacts. Empty for root (simulation_input) artifacts.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this artifact was created.

created_by.description: Module or agent that created this artifact.

lineage_depth.description: Depth in the lineage graph. Root artifacts have depth 0.

root_artifact_ids.description: IDs of all root (simulation_input) ancestors reachable from this artifact.

lineage_valid.description: Whether this artifact's lineage chain has been validated without errors.

lineage_errors.description: List of lineage validation error messages, empty when lineage_valid is true.
